description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: build, cppcheck, and crossbuild, each running on ubuntu-latest. The build job should use a matrix strategy with clang and gcc compilers, install dependencies, check out the code, and run a make command with the selected compiler. The cppcheck job should install cppcheck, check out the code, and run cppcheck. The crossbuild job should install mingw-w64, check out the code, cross-build with a specific CMake toolchain, and upload the resulting artifacts.
